## Summary

What changed?

## Scope

- [ ] This PR is focused on one reviewable change
- [ ] No private notes, personal vaults, generated bundles, or separate marketing-site source are included
- [ ] If Markdown files were added or deleted, `notes/manifest.json` was updated
- [ ] If note frontmatter changed, it only uses `title`, `level`, and `parent`

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build:web`
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] Manual smoke test, if UI/workspace behavior changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know?
